news_items.headline: Mets activate Luis Robert Jr. after almost 3 months on IL
Dodgers on Deck: Tuesday, July 21 at Phillies
news_items.summary: The Dodgers and Philadelphia Phillies resume their series on Tuesday night at Citizens Bank Park. Justin Wrobleski makes the start on Tuesday, one week after he struck out five in two innings in his first All-Star Game, in this same ballpark. Five strikeouts for Wrobleski tied a Dodgers record for an All-Star Game, joining Don […]

news_items.headline: Series Preview: St. Louis Cardinals at the Los Angeles Angels
news_items.summary: The St. Louis Cardinals continue their westward swing as they’ll begin a 3-game series in Anaheim starting Monday night against the Los Angeles Angels who are now led by their former President of Baseball Operations, John Mozeliak. Here are the expected pitching matchups according to MLB.com: Monday night: Kyle Leahy 7-4, 3.73 ERA, 75 SO vs José […]

news_items.headline: Red Sox ride 13-game win streak to a wild card spot, Shohei Ohtani puts pitching on hold & Blue Jays get a reality check
news_items.summary: On this episode of Baseball Bar-B-Cast, Jake and Jordan talk about the Red Sox riding a 13-game winning streak into a wild card spot, Shohei Ohtani deciding not to pitch for the foreseeable future and the Blue Jays needing to figure things out quickly.
